headline: A Look At Roper Technologies (ROP) Valuation After Recent Share Price Weakness
summary: Roper Technologies (ROP) is back in focus after recent trading put a spotlight on its mixed return profile, including a decline of about 9% over the past month alongside slightly positive performance over the past 3 months. See our latest analysis for Roper Technologies. At a share price of US$328.91, Roper Technologies has seen its 1 day share price return slip 0.63%, while the 1 month share price return is down 9.25% and the 1 year total shareholder return has fallen 42.68%.
